source_command: manual sealed authority preflight readiness review
summary: Record follow-up from sealed authority preflight readiness planning.

observations.problem: The sealed authority preflight correctly records a typed clean or blocked state in tmp evidence, and canonical auto-improve readiness now consumes clean sealed preflight evidence without self-blocking through the batch manifest lane snapshot.
observations.why_it_matters: This prevents operators from getting stuck in a regenerate/test loop after a clean sealed preflight simply because stale readiness blockers were echoed back through release-lane-summary and release-closeout-batch-manifest.
observations.automation_candidate: Resolved by making the release batch manifest readiness gate ignore self-referential auto_improve_lane_status snapshots, adding a regression test, and adding release workflow repetition-budget guard coverage.
observations.suggested_followup: Closed in this task. Future repeated closeout refresh targets should be added only through the explicit release_evidence_closeout_repetition_budget allowlist and a matching test.
